item.title: We can do something similar to this in the USA!
item.description: Supermarkets in Vietnam have adopted an initiative from Thailand that makes use of banana leaves instead of plastic as a packaging alternative.
item.dc:creator: Ice2Ice2

item.title: Just the tip
item.description: I work at a bar in a Colorado ski town and had just given this couple some very solid and friendly service but nothing out of the ordinary. When it came time to sign the bill he asked me how much of a tip I wanted. I jokingly said “$1k is a nice round number” as I say to every douchebag who asks this stupid question and then tips 20%. The dude did not hesitate and his wife chuckled as he stroked out the thousand dollar tip and all the while she was looking at her phone and never looked up but chimed in “you should have asked for 2”. Must be nice.
item.dc:creator: MadeYouLookAgain

item.title: Les > Bear
item.description: 50,000 views and not a single mention of the tiny Frenchman... I'm not mad, I'm just disappointed.
item.dc:creator: slotheroll

item.title: So apparently this was my 13th favourite - WTF?
item.dc:creator: naugie

item.title: FINLAND, FINLAND, FINLAND
item.description:
The little known country, Finland, is showing her true colours. This first photo is our current Miss Finland
We use our lion with Finnish blue and while colours only when the topic is about military or ice hockey.
Yeah, these things do really happen and I’m so proud of us being silly enough to do that!
Ice diving is not an insulated issue. We do that, it keeps our bodies and minds fresh! The other Finns, will be happy to answer your question about FINLAND, FINLAND, FINLAND, the place I would want to be.
item.dc:creator: tennessine

item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: This is so Sad
item.description: Texas power providers ERCOT and Entergy Corporation have been hit with a $100 million lawsuit accusing them of gross negligence in the death of a child whose family suspects he suffered hypothermia when they lost electricity and heat in their mobile home during a historic cold snap. The mother of 11-year-old Cristian Pineda filed the wrongful death lawsuit in Jefferson County District Court, alleging the utility giants "put profits over the welfare of people" by ignoring previous recommendations to winterize its power grid, which sustained an epic failure last week and left more than 4 million customers without heat and electricity as temperatures in some parts of the state plunged to single digits. Read more: https://abcn.ws/3booPR6 (originally posted by @TheRainbowegoSweet007 on 2021-02-22 03:02:57)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Assorted All Video Dump
item.description:
Welcome to the dump everyone! Hope y’all had a great week and are read for the week! Here’s a wildly assorted dump for your viewing pleasure. Check your wifi and enjoy!
#5
#10
#15
How? Did the shark spit out the bird or did the bird swim under the shark?
Forbidden taffy
#20
#25
Skrrrrt
Hey why’d you fall? Oh that’s why.
#30
#35 mind blown
#40
#45
I love this.
Duck tax I hope you all enjoyed the dump! Have a great day, and remember, it costs nothing to be kind.

item.dc:creator: trippingthelightfantastic

item.title: Guy received a random message from an old schoolmate about his dad, who was the janitor when they were all in elementary to middle school together.
item.description: I remember the janitor at my elementary school. He had one arm, but still performed all his duties. I always made sure to say good morning to him. We had a running joke where he'd say, watch out or I'm going to get you! Then he'd take a swing with his missing arm, I laughed and would say, "Maybe next time!!" God Bless Janitors!
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Final day of Puckett Week
item.description:
Hi everyone, I'm MrPuckett
I've been posting on imgur all week celebrating different milestones for my family My hospice dog turned 16, PJ turned 2, and it was MrsPuckett's adoption anniversary all in the same week
I still get pretty nervous posting here sometimes, so I wanted to thank everyone for helping out with Puckett Week and all the nice comments and messages the last 7 days
As most of you know, I love showing off pictures of my little dogs running all over Nashville
And showing off all the progress my hospice dog is making since we adopted her in July
All this week we've been sending goods and raising funds for domestic violence survivors facing homelessness. In mainly $16 donations, we've raised over $12,000 in only 6 days!!!!
Domestic violence is the leading cause of homelessness for women and children in America. I was super happy to find The Mary Parrish Center who offers free housing and support to survivors, everything they might need to start their life fresh and stay off the street.
It's like this oasis of incredibly nice apartment homes that survivors can stay in for up to a year to get their life back together with their children and dogs. When they feel safe enough to move out on their own, they even get to take all of the furniture and everything inside their apartment at Mary Parrish.
Today is the final day of Puckett Week. It's been an incredible week of support from everyone seeing these posts Not only the donations and sending items to survivors off the Wishlist, but everyone being so supportive of me and everyone else in the comments. If it makes me feel this good, imagine how it'll make survivors feel when they get out of an abusive relationship, out of a shelter and into their new safe apartment.
So while this is probably my last post for a while, I can't thank everyone enough for making all of this possible. For one final time in Puckett Week 2022 - If you would like to donate $16 in honor of Nanna's 16th birthday - https://www.maryparrish.org/donate You can also send items directly to residents at Mary Parrish on their Wishlist here - https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/3USHUHIVSINQE?ref_=wl_share ... I love you, thank you all so much for being there for me and being there for survivors.
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.title: Tales of Harlowe Chapter 2: The Deputy
item.description: And that's chapter 2! You can read chapter 1, as well as my other comics, on my website here: https://theangryden.net *Most Viral edit: This is the first time I've ever made Most Viral with my own content! That's a good feeling! I know the tradition is to ask for something, so do something nice for a stranger!
item.dc:creator: IrateWolfe

item.title: Mission to Save Phone Space Dump
item.description: Edit: Thanks everyone~ This is the first time! I've not posted much so this was nice to come back to. I'm happy to see so many fellow animal lovers. I don't know what to do here, but I've seen others edit these posts. Perhaps if you watch the twitch thing, I have a twitch page :) https://www.twitch.tv/idthefallen
item.dc:creator: AlwaysRoomForScience

item.title: I have a pet name for "Fucker Charlatan" too
item.description:
https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2022/feb/19/aoc-tucker-carlson-ocasio-cortez-fox-news-woman-of-colour
https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2022/feb/19/aoc-tucker-carlson-ocasio-cortez-fox-news-woman-of-colour
https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2022/feb/19/aoc-tucker-carlson-ocasio-cortez-fox-news-woman-of-colour
Another pet name but it's more visual as it sounds the same
I'll come back in with some more source URLs later because Imgur tends to object when there is more than one. For now, here is more on the Great [White] Replacement Theory (with bonus "Pro-Life" reasoning): https://imgur.com/a/OzBXhCX
item.dc:creator: duoplicity
